---
title: "Stopword visualization"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-05"
---

# Initialization

Grab packages.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(tikzDevice)
```

# Read data

Read the results of the size comparisons.

```{r}
stopwords <- read.csv("out/Corpus.DACB5.FinalDrop-Monolingual(NR).2.0.0.CAM.2021-01-31.nr.txt_output.csv", header = T)
stopwords$top_n <- as.factor(stopwords$top_n)
```


# Visualization

Create graph for the results.

```{r}
stopwords %>%
    ggplot( aes(x = percentage, y = jaccard, color = top_n)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    geom_line()
```
